title: HavenBags - Backpack Preview
description: HavenBagsPreview is a lightweight Fabric mod that allows you to view the contents of your HavenBags plugin backpacks directly in the inventory tooltip, just like a bundle or shulker preview. Save time and manage your bags more efficiently!
body:
## Description:
This lightweight and convenient client-side mod, designed specifically for use with the HavenBags plugin, enables you to view the contents of any HavenBags bag directly in the tooltip when hovering over the item in your inventory. Eliminate uncertainty and avoid repeatedly opening bags to inspect their contents. This mod facilitates swift and efficient inventory management, conserving time and resources.

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6mibkpX2/images/a6bd9a6d30fff070c8f13d996088f32cf437e0e4.png)

## Features:
- **Instant Preview**: View the contents of HavenBags bags without needing to open them.
- **User-Friendly Interface**: Hover over a HavenBags item in your inventory to display its contents in the tooltip.
- **Efficiency**: Optimize your inventory management by reducing unnecessary actions.

## Installation:
1. Ensure you have Minecraft Fabric Loader installed.
2. Download the HavenBagsPreview mod file and Fabric API.
3. Place the mod file in your mods folder within the .minecraft directory.
4. Launch Minecraft and enjoy the enhanced inventory management!

## Compatibility:
- Requires Fabric Loader
- Compatible with Minecraft versions 1.17 and above
- Requires the server to have the [HavenBags plugin](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/havenbags-shulker-like-player-bound-bags-1-17-1-20-4.110420) installed for functionality

### Acknowledgements:
This mod is a fork of MTBackpacksPreview, and special thanks go to the original creators, ZtereoHYPE and masecla22, for their foundational work.

### Support:
For any issues or suggestions, please visit our [GitHub page](https://github.com/ArturoAtomplay/HavenBagsPreview) or join our [Discord community](https://discord.gg/7HPbD57BVx)

If you are looking for a server to test the mod and play, we invite you to join us on [Ravencrest](https://minecraftservers.org/server/661795)

For more information about the HavenBags plugin, visit the [SpigotMC page](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/havenbags-shulker-like-player-bound-bags-1-17-1-20-4.110420)
